allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== node ==="; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; node --version 2>&1; Write-Output "=== npm ==="; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; npm --version 2>&1; Write-Output "=== python ==="; \(Get-Command python\).Source; \(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
